summary: The test suite covers the core retention policies (age, keep-latest-N, size cap) and includes a combined policy test, but lacks rigor in edge cases (boundaries, zero values, conflicts, identical timestamps), error scenarios (missing files, invalid JSON), and complete script functionality (PlanOutPath output, non-dry-run behavior). The combined policies test is valuable but the suite would miss subtle bugs around policy interactions and boundary conditions. Workflow validation tests YAML structure and runs 3 cases through act, which is helpful but limited. Overall, would catch obvious regressions on the happy path but not edge case failures.
